edition: Advaita Ashrama (Belur Math) edition, Swami Gambhirananda, *Bhagavadgītā with the Annotation Gūḍhārtha-Dīpikā*, 1998 (Sanskrit + English)
commentaries_included: English translation and notes by Swami Gambhirananda

expected_text_units.source_for_estimate: Bhagavad-Gītā canonical 700 ślokas, each with Madhusūdana's gloss

ground_truth_source: Embedded English translation by Gambhirananda is itself a high-quality bilingual comparator; GRETIL Gītā mūla provides verse-level ground truth.
first_page_visual_quality_notes: Heuristic (KB/page ~466): high-DPI scan. Producer 'BookChanger 4.6.3'. 1052 pages of clean Advaita Ashrama typesetting.
ocr_friendliness_notes: Bilingual Sanskrit/English layout requires script-detection and region masking. The Sanskrit Devanagari portion is typical Belur Math house style — clean. English portion is straightforward Latin OCR.
